canksik/;k;] la;qDr lfpo -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(ii)] MINISTRY OF ROAD TRANSPORT AND HIGHWAYS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 19th May, 2015 S.O.1336(E).— In exercise of the powers conferred by section 8A of the National Highways Act, 1956 (48 of 1956) read with Rule 3 of the National Highways Fee (Determination of Rates and Collection) Rules 2008, the Central Government by notifications number S.O. 3121(E), dated 10th December, 2014 and S.O. 3122(E), dated 10th December, 2014 of the Government of India has authorized National Highways Authority of India (the “Authority”) to levy and collect fee on mechanical vehicles for the use of Karur - Kangeyam Section from km 218.200 to km 277.400 (KC-1 Package) and Kangeyam – Coimbatore Section from km 277.400 to km 332.600 (KC-2 Package) of NH – 67 in the State of Tamil Nadu respectively. Now, in exercise of the powers conferred by Section 8A of the National Highways Act 1956, (48 of 1956) read with Rule 3 of the National Highways Fee (Determination of Rates and Collection) Rules, 2008, the Central Government hereby rescinds the notifications number S.O. 3121(E) dated 10th December, 2014 and S.O. 3122(E) dated 10th December, 2014. [F. No. NHAI/13013/584/10-11/CO/GC Karur (218.2-277.4 & 277.4-332.6)] SANJAY BANDOPADHYAYA, Jt. Secy. Printed by the Manager, Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 2 of 2 --
